What We Offer

FIND YOUR PROGRAM

Four programs built for real locals at every stage of the journey. Not sure which is right for you? Get in touch and we'll help you figure it out.

Contact us →
Most Popular
Team Training · Group Coaching

BOOTCAMP

High-energy group sessions that build strength, burn fat, and keep you accountable. Bootcamp delivers structure and energy in a supportive environment.

  • ✓Multiple sessions daily — morning & evening
  • ✓All fitness levels welcome, fully scalable
  • ✓Expert coach leads every single session
Learn more → Book a free session
★ Best Results
Semi-Private Coaching

MEN'S CLUB

For men who want more than a gym. Men's Club gives you a clear plan, expert coaching, and a crew of blokes who hold each other accountable.

  • ✓Small group sessions for real attention
  • ✓Fully personalised training program
  • ✓Weekly accountability check-ins
Learn more → Book a free session
★ Best Results
Semi-Private Coaching

WOMEN'S CLUB

Build real strength and confidence in a supportive, welcoming space. Expert guidance in smaller groups tailored to your goals.

  • ✓Women-only sessions — zero intimidation
  • ✓Small group sessions — you're never a number
  • ✓Program tailored to your body & goals
Learn more → Book a free session
Ages 13–17
Teen Training Program

YOUNG KNIGHTS

Building physical strength, resilience, and confidence in teens through structured coaching that sets them up for success in life.

  • ✓Structured, age-appropriate training
  • ✓Expert coaching focused on development
  • ✓Builds physical strength & athletic foundations
  • ✓Safe, supervised, and fun environment
Learn more → Contact us

NOT SURE WHICH PROGRAM IS RIGHT?

Get in touch and a coach will help you figure it out — no pressure, no hard sell.
